name: Kindergarten Digital Art & Design — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for safe device routines, shapes, color, and simple digital marks. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with safe device routines, shapes, color, and simple digital marks.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

activities.title: A close look at safe device routines, shapes, color, and simple digital marks
